Uses of Class
neqsim.process.research.ProcessResearchSpec.Builder

Packages that use ProcessResearchSpec.Builder
Package
Description
neqsim.process.research
Process synthesis and candidate-ranking utilities for process research workflows.

  • Uses of ProcessResearchSpec.Builder in neqsim.process.research

    Sets economic assumptions.

    ProcessResearchSpec.Builder.setEnableFeasibilityPruning(boolean enableFeasibilityPruning)
    Sets whether fast feasibility pruning is enabled.
    ProcessResearchSpec.Builder
    ProcessResearchSpec.Builder.setEvaluateCandidates(boolean evaluateCandidates)
    Sets whether candidates should be evaluated.
    ProcessResearchSpec.Builder

    Sets feed flow rate.

    Sets the feed material name used by graph-based synthesis.

    ProcessResearchSpec.Builder.setFeedPressure(double pressureBara)
    Sets feed pressure.
    ProcessResearchSpec.Builder
    ProcessResearchSpec.Builder.setFeedTemperature(double temperatureK)
    Sets feed temperature.

    Sets the thermodynamic model.
    ProcessResearchSpec.Builder
    ProcessResearchSpec.Builder.setHeatIntegrationDeltaTMinC(double heatIntegrationDeltaTMinC)
    Sets pinch-analysis minimum approach temperature.
    ProcessResearchSpec.Builder
    ProcessResearchSpec.Builder.setIncludeCostEstimate(boolean includeCostEstimate)
    Sets whether cost metrics are included.
    ProcessResearchSpec.Builder

    Sets whether emissions metrics are included.
    ProcessResearchSpec.Builder
    ProcessResearchSpec.Builder.setIncludeHeatIntegration(boolean includeHeatIntegration)
    Sets whether heat-integration metrics are included.
    ProcessResearchSpec.Builder
    ProcessResearchSpec.Builder.setIncludeSynthesisLibrary(boolean includeSynthesisLibrary)
    Sets whether the built-in synthesis operation library should be included.
    ProcessResearchSpec.Builder

    Sets the maximum number of candidates.
    ProcessResearchSpec.Builder

    Sets the maximum number of optimization cases per candidate.
    ProcessResearchSpec.Builder

    Sets the maximum graph synthesis depth.

    Sets the mixing rule.

    Sets the study name.

    Sets the objective.

    Sets scoring weights.
